case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. HSIENJUNG YEH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCL.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE OCT-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
